home.subtitle: Live results and race timing for our community triathlon.

hof.title: Hall of Fame
hof.subtitle: All-time records and champions of the Gal-On Triathlon.
hof.searchPlaceholder: Search a name — see every race and result…
hof.place: {place, selectordinal, one {#st} two {#nd} few {#rd} other {#th}} place
hof.medalsNote: Career medals from the individual races (1st / 2nd / 3rd in each year and category).
hof.medalsWithGroupsNote: Includes team podiums — each member of a medal-winning team is credited. Teams whose roster couldn't be split reliably are not counted.
hof.sourceNote: Records compiled from the 2018–2023 result sheets. Spot a mistake? Let the staff know.

results.title: Results
results.name: Name
results.noEntries: No competitors registered in this category yet.
results.hidden: Live results aren't published yet. Check back soon.

stations.title: Timing Stations
stations.subtitle: Choose the station you're working at.
stations.checkinDesc: Mark competitors arrived at the gathering area
stations.startDesc: Start the clock for a heat

stationStart.title: Start Station
stationStart.rosterHint: Untick anyone who isn't here. Tap a name to fix a last-minute replacement.
stationStart.poolFinishHint: The start-line timekeeper is at the pool — you can also record swim-exit times here.
stationStart.notActiveYet: The competition hasn't been activated yet. Check back once the admin starts it.

stationStamp.title: Stamp Times
stationStamp.noEntries: No competitors waiting at this station.
stationStamp.manualHint: Type the arrival time from the clock (HH:MM:SS).

manage.confirmDeleteEntry: Remove this competitor/team and all their times?
manage.confirmDeleteHeat: Delete this heat and all its entries? This cannot be undone.
manage.closeRegistrationConfirm: Close registration? Competitors will no longer be able to sign up until you re-open it.
manage.openRegistrationConfirm: Open registration? Competitors will be able to sign up.
manage.generateScheduleConfirm: Form teams, create heats, and generate the schedule from all checked-in registrants? Safe to re-run for anyone not yet placed.
manage.activateConfirm: Activate the competition? Timing stations go live for all timekeepers.
manage.unassignedNone: Every competitor is in a group.
manage.unassignedHint: These competitors aren't in any group, so they won't be placed in a heat. Form a group for them on the Registration tab to get them into a heat.
manage.confirmDeleteRegistrant: Remove this competitor? They will be unlinked from any group they belong to.
manage.unpublishScheduleConfirm: Hide the schedule from the public? Participants won't see the heat list until you publish again.
manage.preliminaryScheduleHint: Estimate based on current registrations — updates as people sign up
manage.noRegistrantsYet: No registrations yet — expected heat counts will appear here as people sign up.
manage.dashboardSubtitle: Full control of the competition, in the order it happens.
manage.randomGroupingHint: Auto-forms relay teams from the available pool when generating heats.
manage.contactsHint: Doctor, security, volunteers… Shown to all competitors on the info page.
manage.heatsHint: Auto-generated from registrations. Open a heat to edit its roster and times.
manage.scoresReviewHint: Results stay hidden from the public until you both approve them and set them visible.
manage.resultsLivePublic: Results are live to the public.
manage.resultsNotLivePublic: Results are not visible to the public yet.
manage.addToHofLabel: Add this year's results to the Hall of Fame
manage.addToHofHint: Imports finished results for the year. Safe to re-run.
manage.noResultsYet: No results yet — they appear here as timekeepers stamp finish times.
manage.hofHint: The full historical record — add, edit or remove any result.
manage.hofError: Please check the fields and try again.
manage.infoHint: Editable rules, trail descriptions and maps shown to competitors.
manage.infoUploadNotConfigured: Upload isn't set up — paste an image URL instead.
manage.infoUploadFailed: Upload failed — try again or paste a URL.
manage.confirmDeleteGroup: Delete this group? Its members return to the available pool.
manage.heatsBoardHint: Drag competitors between heats to organise them. On a wide screen the heats sit side by side. Times are edited on the Results tab.
manage.scoresEditHint: QC: tap a time to correct it against the camera / manual record. Ranking updates automatically.
manage.createGroupHint: Choose who swims, bikes and runs. All three legs must be filled so the runner is clearly defined. The same person can take two legs (e.g. one swims and bikes while a teammate runs).
manage.createGroupIncomplete: Assign someone to all three legs (swim, bike, run).
manage.createGroupFailed: Couldn't create the group. Try again.
manage.groupIncomplete: Incomplete group — a leg is unassigned.
manage.groupNoRunner: No runner assigned — assign a runner before the finish line.
manage.groupsBoardHint: Drag competitors between groups to assign them. Dropping onto a taken cell replaces the occupant — they return to the unassigned tray. Drag to the tray to remove from a group.
manage.unassignedTrayEmpty: Everyone is assigned to a group.
manage.pickedHint: Picked {name} — tap a cell to place them.
manage.lotteryHint: Form random teams from the ungrouped competitors in this category.
manage.lotteryConfirm: Form random teams from the ungrouped competitors in this category? Existing groups are left unchanged.
manage.lotteryAllHint: Form random teams from every ungrouped competitor, across all team categories.
manage.lotteryAllConfirm: Form random teams from every ungrouped competitor in all categories? Existing groups are left unchanged.

info.title: Rules & Trails
info.subtitle: Everything you need to know for race day.
info.empty: Information will be posted here soon.

register.title: Race Registration
register.name: Full name
register.legsPrompt: Which leg(s) are you willing to do? (choose one or more)
register.success: You're registered! See you at the event.
register.errorInvalid: Please check your details and try again.
register.errorNoLeg: Please choose at least one leg for a relay team.
register.chooseAvailable: Put me in a group (I'm available)
register.chooseHasGroup: I have a group (I'll pick the members)
register.groupModeJoin: Join a group a teammate already started
register.assignRoles: Assign the three legs. Take at least one yourself.
register.createGroupHint: For each leg, pick yourself, choose someone already registered as available, name a teammate to register them right now, or set it to "will be added later".
register.joinPrompt: Choose a group and the leg you'll do.
register.noOpenGroups: No open groups yet — start a new one above.
register.errorRolesIncomplete: Please set each leg to a person or to "will be added later".
register.errorRolesInvalid: The same person can't do all three legs.
register.errorCaptainRole: Please take at least one leg yourself.
register.errorJoinLeg: Please choose a group and which leg you'll do.
register.errorJoinTaken: That leg was just taken. Please pick another group or leg.
register.errorBadTeammate: One of the teammates is no longer available. Please re-pick.
register.errorNameLettersOnly: Name must contain letters only — no numbers allowed.
register.errorDuplicate: This name is already registered in this category.
register.errorLegConflict: This competitor is already assigned to this leg in another group.

testdata.title: QC / Test Data
testdata.hint: For pre-launch testing only. Generate fake competitors, then reset before opening real registration.
testdata.resetConfirm: Delete ALL registrants, groups, heats and times? This cannot be undone.
testdata.resetResultsConfirm: Clear all heats, the schedule and every timing stamp, but KEEP the registered competitors, their teams and check-ins? You can then generate the schedule and start again.
testdata.resetResultsDone: Results and timing cleared — competitors kept.

competitorFilters.title: Filter competitors
competitorFilters.hint: View only — to spot anomalies that need attention. Editing is done in the roster below.

schedule.title: Race Schedule
schedule.notGenerated: The schedule hasn't been published yet.

competitors.title: Registered Competitors
competitors.subtitle: Everyone signed up for this year's triathlon.
